narrative:
Miamisburg 4-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,346 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.7 percentage points.
